nodes.label: AI as supplement to creative process
nodes.grounding_span: I often only turn to AI after failing to quickly do the task on my own

nodes.label: AI for low-complexity content variation
nodes.grounding_span: I might feed AI the question and ask it to change details

nodes.label: AI reliability in English vs. ESL contexts
nodes.grounding_span: in English-speaking environments, AI hasn't been up to par for me

nodes.label: Authenticity in creative work
nodes.grounding_span: I try to be an exemplar in not doing so

nodes.label: AI for data analysis and report writing
nodes.grounding_span: AI was extremely helpful in taking certain statements and rewording them

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: save myself the time and effort of brainstorming

nodes.label: Authenticity and personal integrity
nodes.grounding_span: would rather be able to definitively state any ideas or work submitted is my own

nodes.label: Educational effectiveness
nodes.grounding_span: students seem more and more reliant on AI to do classwork/homework, and I try to be an exemplar in not doing so

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for wording tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI was extremely helpful in taking certain statements and rewording them

nodes.label: Frustration with AI's unnatural wording
nodes.grounding_span: I found myself rewording my requests and getting nowhere after ten minutes

nodes.label: Principled minimal use of AI
nodes.grounding_span: I rely on it very minimally, almost out of principle

nodes.label: Openness to increasing AI use in future
nodes.grounding_span: I might rely on AI a bit more for brainstorming

nodes.label: Iterative context refinement — provides initial context then adds more to refine
nodes.grounding_span: If I can avoid it, I don't give the AI much context

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — clear separation of AI-appropriate vs. human-only tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I rely on it very minimally, almost out of principle
